description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a rich brown material, likely leather or faux leather, with a sleek and minimalist design. The sofa features three main seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be firmly attached. The right side of the sofa extends into a chaise lounge, providing ample space for reclining. Both armrests are present, rounded, and padded, matching the overall upholstery and sitting at the same height as the backrest. The sofa is supported by slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing a clean and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern L-shaped brown leather sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, rounded padded armrests, and slim black metal legs. The design is sleek, with smooth, uniform cushions and a minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat and back cushions, chaise lounge on the right, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the seat, the left armrest, and the thickness of the cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the alignment of the three back cushions, as well as the sofa's overall length.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, emphasizing the chaise lounge extension, right armrest, and the sofa's slim profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all attached and arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout with a chaise lounge extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, rounded, and padded, sitting at the same height as the backrest with a smooth, continuous profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners, slightly angled outward, with a minimalist and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest segmented into three attached cushions, matching the seat cushions in width and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown upholstery with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
